name: Bathroom Wastebasket Gold - Threshold™
description:
Keep unsightly waste concealed while adding a sleek touch to any room in your home with this Solid Faceted Wastebasket from Threshold™. With a wide, open top that lets you empty the inside contents with ease and a solid metal design for sleek flair, this solid bathroom wastebasket makes a practical addition to any space. This metallic bathroom wastebasket features a cool, faceted design that lends your space a touch of modern style, and is the perfect way to keep unsightly waste concealed. Simply add it to your bathroom or any other room in your home that needs a place to stow away trash.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
